faqs.question: What is Cloud PBX?
faqs.answer: Cloud PBX (Private Branch Exchange) is a business phone system that operates over the internet instead of traditional phone lines, eliminating the need for expensive on-premise hardware.

faqs.question: Can I use my existing handsets?
faqs.answer: Yes, VestaCall works with most SIP-enabled desk phones from major brands like Polycom, Yealink, and Cisco, as well as our full-featured mobile and desktop applications.

faqs.question: How secure is your virtual phone system?
faqs.answer: Our system is SOC 2 Type II certified and utilizes enterprise-grade TLS and SRTP encryption to ensure all communications remain private and secure.

cta.title: Ready to Elevate Your Communication?
cta.description: Transform your business phone system with enterprise-grade cloud PBX. Join thousands of companies already using Vesta Call to power their communications.

faqs.question: What is SIP Trunking?
faqs.answer: SIP Trunking is a method of delivering voice and media services over the internet to an existing on-site PBX or UCaaS platform, replacing traditional T1/E1 lines with elastic cloud capacity.

faqs.question: Do you support STIR/SHAKEN?
faqs.answer: Yes, our network is fully STIR/SHAKEN compliant, ensuring that your caller ID is properly authenticated and preventing your calls from being flagged as 'Scam Likely'.

faqs.question: What is 1-second billing?
faqs.answer: Unlike most providers who bill in 60-second increments, VestaCall offers 1/1 billing (1-second increments), ensuring you only pay for the exact duration of every connection.

cta.title: Ready to Elevate Your Communication?
cta.description: Connect your infrastructure to the global network with carrier-grade SIP trunking. Experience the reliability and reach that only Vesta Call delivers.

steps.title: AI Understands

steps.title: Resolved or Routed
steps.description: Either resolves the inquiry instantly or routes to the perfect agent with full context.

faqs.question: What is NLU?
faqs.answer: Natural Language Understanding (NLU) allows our AI to understand human speech patterns, idioms, and intent, rather than just matching keywords like traditional IVR systems.

faqs.question: What is the latency for voice bots?
faqs.answer: Our edge-optimized AI engine delivers responses in under 500ms, ensuring a fluid, natural conversation that feels human-like and eliminates awkward pauses.

faqs.question: How does human handoff work?
faqs.answer: If the AI detects complexity or frustration beyond its scope, it instantly transfers the call to a live agent along with a full transcript of the conversation so the customer never has to repeat themselves.

cta.title: Ready to Elevate Your Communication?

faqs.question: What is CCaaS?
faqs.answer: CCaaS (Contact Center as a Service) is a cloud-based customer experience solution that allows companies to manage all customer interactions across multiple channels without maintaining physical hardware.

faqs.question: Do you support omnichannel routing?
faqs.answer: Yes, VestaCall unifies voice, SMS, email, and social media into a single agent desktop, ensuring a consistent context-aware experience for customers.

faqs.question: Can we scale seat counts seasonally?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our platform is built for elasticity, allowing you to scale from 10 to 1,000+ seats instantly to meet seasonal demand without long-term commitments.

steps.title: Data Capture
steps.description: Our network captures every packet and event from your active calls in real-time with zero overhead.

steps.title: AI Synthesis
steps.description: Raw data is processed through our AI engine to calculate sentiment, trends, and projected SLA targets.

steps.title: Instant Alerts
steps.description: Visual wallboards and automated alerts notify your supervisors the moment a metric slips out of bounds.

faqs.question: Is the data truly real-time?
faqs.answer: Yes, our analytics engine is built directly into our carrier-grade switching fabric, meaning metrics are updated within milliseconds of an event occurring.

faqs.question: Can I export historical data?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. VestaCall allows you to export detailed CSV or PDF reports, or connect directly to your BI tools (like Tableau or PowerBI) via our robust REST API.

faqs.question: Do you provide sentiment analysis?
faqs.answer: Yes, our AI-driven sentiment analysis monitors call audio in real-time to detect customer frustration or joy, providing a live 'mood' score for every active interaction.

cta.title: Ready to Master Your Metrics?
